title: Noumenal Loom
name: Noumenal Loom
body:
Experimental electronic label based in Rhode Island. Run by **[[people/isabel-barnes|Isabel Barnes]]**. Released the posthumous Killd By compilation *Neotropical* (April 3, 2020), all proceeds directed to the CRFW Fund at RedLine. Since closed.

The Neotropical release was covered in a Bandcamp Daily feature by Sam Goldner ([April 10, 2020](https://daily.bandcamp.com/features/colin-ward-interview)) — the longest-form posthumous Colin Ward profile with national readership.

See: [[people/isabel-barnes]], [[releases/killd-by-neotropical]], [[press/2020-04-bandcamp-daily-neotropical-colin-ward]]
